phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find cork goods
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar artigos de cortiça por aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee POS-soo en-kon-TRAR ahz (link: ahz-boo) boo-TEE-keesh jee (link: jee-kor) kor-TEE-sah NES-tah ROO-ah
phrases.cultural_note: Cork is a traditional Portuguese material, widely used in local boutiques.

likely_response.local: Há lojas de cortiça na Rua Nova, perto daqui.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH LOH-zhuhsh DIH koo-ruh-TEE-suh NUH ROOUH NAW-vuh, PEHR-too duh-KEE.
likely_response.translation_en: There are cork shops on Rua Nova, near here.

responses.english: There are cork shops on Rua Nova, near here.
responses.phonetic: AH LOH-zhuhsh DIH koo-ruh-TEE-suh NUH ROOUH NAW-vuh, PEHR-too duh-KEE.
responses.local: Há lojas de cortiça na Rua Nova, perto daqui.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso pagar com cartão aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo puh-GAHR KOHM kuh-ruh-TOWN uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao caixa ou ao proprietário de uma loja.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW KEYE-shuh OHW OW proop-reeih-TAHR-yoo DIH OO-muh LAW-zhuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the cashier or the owner of a store.

responses.english: Ask the cashier or the owner of a store.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW KEYE-shuh OHW OW proop-reeih-TAHR-yoo DIH OO-muh LAW-zhuh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao caixa ou ao proprietário de uma loja.

likely_response.local: Use o balcão de prova de azeite.
likely_response.pronunciation: OO-zih AW bahl-KOWN DIH PRAW-vuh DIH uh-ZAY-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Use the olive oil tasting counter.

responses.english: Use the olive oil tasting counter.
responses.phonetic: OO-zih AW bahl-KOWN DIH PRAW-vuh DIH uh-ZAY-tih.
responses.local: Use o balcão de prova de azeite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find cork goods
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar artigos de cortiça?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR uh-ruh-TEE-goosh DIH koo-ruh-TEE-suh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portugal is the world's largest cork producer, and cork goods are a popular souvenir in the Algarve.

likely_response.local: Pode encontrar nas butiques de cortiça desta rua, pergunte ao proprietário.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih ayng-koongt-RAHR NUHSH boo-TEE-kihsh DIH koo-ruh-TEE-suh DEHSH-tuh ROOUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW proop-reeih-TAHR-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: You can find them in the cork goods boutiques on this street, ask the owner.

responses.english: You can find them in the cork goods boutiques on this street, ask the owner.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih ayng-koongt-RAHR NUHSH boo-TEE-kihsh DIH koo-ruh-TEE-suh DEHSH-tuh ROOUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW proop-reeih-TAHR-yoo.
responses.local: Pode encontrar nas butiques de cortiça desta rua, pergunte ao proprietário.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay with card
phrases.cultural_note: While many market stalls and small shops in Tavira prefer cash, some establishments like bakeries offer card payment.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar um provador de linho?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OONNG proo-vuh-DOHR DIH LEE-nyoo?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao vendedor na loja de linho.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR NUH LAW-zhuh DIH LEE-nyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the salesperson in the linen shop.

responses.english: Ask the salesperson in the linen shop.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR NUH LAW-zhuh DIH LEE-nyoo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao vendedor na loja de linho.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the linen fitting room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o provador para roupas de linho?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW proo-vuh-DOHR PUH-ruh ROHW-puhsh DIH LEE-nyoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Linen is a popular fabric in the Algarve region, often used for clothing and home textiles.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the linen fitting room is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a cabine de prova para tecidos de linho?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH kuh-BEE-nih DIH PRAW-vuh PUH-ruh teh-SEE-doosh DIH LEE-nyoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Linen fitting rooms allow customers to try traditional textiles before purchase.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cork goods boutiques are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as lojas de produtos em cortiça?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH LOH-zhuhsh DIH proo-DOO-toosh AYNG koo-ruh-TEE-suh?
phrases.cultural_note: Cork boutiques offer sustainable accessories and home decor items.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as boutiques de cortiça.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH boow-TEE-kihsh DIH koo-ruh-TEE-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the cork boutiques.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the cork boutiques.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH boow-TEE-kihsh DIH koo-ruh-TEE-suh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para as boutiques de cortiça.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso provar azeite por aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo proo-VAHR uh-ZAY-tih POOR uh-KEE?
